purpose: Select the smallest stable profile that still matches the target skill.
instruction: Upgrade to workflow_path only when the skill truly needs compiled path execution.
Prefer contract_cli over automation_cli unless an actual action command is required.
workflow: Run scaffold once with the final profile instead of layering post-generation edits.
rules: Do not use legacy skill_mode names as the decision source.
Do not add references, tests, or path only because an older template did.
